title: Jordi Ensign

'''Jordi Ensign''' was an inker for several [[Dark Horse Comics]] issues, and illustrator for a couple of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebooks by [[West End Games]].

Her non–''Star Wars'' comic work includes [[Wikipedia:H.A.R.D. Corps|''H.A.R.D. Corps'']], [[Wikipedia:Meridian (comics)|''Meridian'']], [[Wikipedia:Aliens (comic book)|''Aliens: Colonial Marines'']], [[Wikipedia:Takion|''Takion'']], [[Wikipedia:Femforce|''Femforce'']], [[Wikipedia:X (Dark Horse Comics)|''X'']], [[Wikipedia:Xena: Warrior Princess (comics)|''Xena: Warrior Princess'']] and [[Wikipedia:Birds of Prey|''Birds of Prey'']].

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==

*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]] - August [[1995]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 2]] - September 1995
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' - ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]'' - 1995–[[1996]]
